subcodes.first_line: O My servant! Hear thou My call, and be not of them that are perturbed in the Cause and are numbered among the lost. I counsel thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد اسمع ندائی و لاتکن من الذینهم اضطربوا فی الامر و کانوا من الخاسرین اوصیک
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @exhortations and counsels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @banishment to; life in Constantinople
